verses.latin_vulgate: Tulit autem Samuel lenticulam olei, et effudit super caput ejus : et deosculatus est eum, et ait : Ecce unxit te Dominus super hæreditatem suam in principem, et liberabis populum suum de manibus inimicorum ejus qui in circuitu ejus sunt. Et hoc tibi signum, quia unxit te Deus in principem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֨ח שְׁמוּאֵ֜ל אֶת־פַּ֥ךְ הַשֶּׁ֛מֶן וַיִּצֹ֥ק עַל־רֹאשׁ֖וֹ וַיִּשָּׁקֵ֑הוּ וַיֹּ֕אמֶר הֲל֗וֹא כִּֽי־מְשָׁחֲךָ֧ יְהֹוָ֛ה עַל־נַחֲלָת֖וֹ לְנָגִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel took a little vial of oil, and poured it upon his head, and kissed him, and said: Behold, the Lord hath anointed thee to be prince over his inheritance, and thou shalt deliver his people out of the hands of their enemies, that are round about them. And this shall be a sign unto thee, that God hath anointed thee to be prince.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin otti Samuel öljyastian ja kaasi hänen päänsä päälle, ja antoi suuta hänen ja sanoi: näetkös, että Herra on sinun voidellut päämieheksi perimisensä päälle?
verses.king_james: Then Samuel took a vial of oil, and poured it upon his head, and kissed him, and said, Is it not because the Lord hath anointed thee to be captain over his inheritance?

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum abieris hodie a me, invenies duos viros juxta sepulchrum Rachel in finibus Benjamin, in meridie : dicentque tibi : Inventæ sunt asinæ ad quas ieras perquirendas : et intermissis pater tuus asinis, sollicitus est pro vobis, et dicit : Quid faciam de filio meo ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּלֶכְתְּךָ֤ הַיּוֹם֙ מֵֽעִמָּדִ֔י וּמָצָ֩אתָ֩ שְׁנֵ֨י אֲנָשִׁ֜ים עִם־קְבֻרַ֥ת רָחֵ֛ל בִּגְב֥וּל בִּנְיָמִ֖ן בְּצֶלְצַ֑ח וְאָמְר֣וּ אֵלֶ֗יךָ נִמְצְא֤וּ הָאֲתֹנוֹת֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָלַ֣כְתָּ לְבַקֵּ֔שׁ וְהִנֵּ֨ה נָטַ֤שׁ אָבִ֙יךָ֙ אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֣י הָאֲתֹנ֔וֹת וְדָאַ֤ג לָכֶם֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר מָ֥ה אֶעֱשֶׂ֖ה לִבְנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: When thou shalt depart from me this day, thou shalt find two men by the sepulchre of Rachel in the borders of Benjamin to the south, and they shall say to thee: The asses are found which thou wentest to seek: and thy father, thinking no more of the asses, is concerned for you, and saith: What shall I do for my son?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin sinä menet minun tyköäni tänäpänä pois, niin sinä löydät kaksi miestä Rakelin haudan tykönä Zelsassa, BenJaminin rajassa: ne sanovat sinulle: aasintammat, joitas olet lähtenyt etsimään, ovat löydetyt: ja katso, ei isäs pidä silleen lukua aaseista, vaan murehtii teitä ja sanoo: mitä minun pitää tekemän pojalleni?
verses.king_james: When thou art departed from me to day, then thou shalt find two men by Rachel’s sepulchre in the border of Benjamin at Zelzah; and they will say unto thee, The asses which thou wentest to seek are found: and, lo, thy father hath left the care of the asses, and sorroweth for you, saying, What shall I do for my son?

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque abieris inde, et ultra transieris, et veneris ad quercum Thabor, invenient te ibi tres viri ascendentes ad Deum in Bethel, unus portans tres hædos, et alius tres tortas panis, et alius portans lagenam vini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחָלַפְתָּ֨ מִשָּׁ֜ם וָהָ֗לְאָה וּבָ֙אתָ֙ עַד־אֵל֣וֹן תָּב֔וֹר וּמְצָא֤וּךָ שָּׁם֙ שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה אֲנָשִׁ֔ים עֹלִ֥ים אֶל־הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים בֵּֽית־אֵ֑ל אֶחָ֞ד נֹשֵׂ֣א ׀ שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה גְדָיִ֗ים וְאֶחָד֙ נֹשֵׂ֗א שְׁלֹ֙שֶׁת֙ כִּכְּר֣וֹת לֶ֔חֶם וְאֶחָ֖ד נֹשֵׂ֥א נֵבֶל־יָֽיִן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when thou shalt depart from thence, and go farther on, and shalt come to the oak of Thabor, there shall meet thee three men going up to God to Bethel, one carrying three kids, and another three loaves of bread, and another carrying a bottle of wine.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin edemmäksi siitä menet, niin sinä tulet Taborin lakeudelle, siinä kohtaavat sinua kolme miestä, jotka Jumalan tykö ylös BetEliin menevät: ensimäinen kantaa kolme vohlaa, ja toinen kantaa kolme kappaletta leipää, ja kolmas kantaa viinaleiliä.
verses.king_james: Then shalt thou go on forward from thence, and thou shalt come to the plain of Tabor, and there shall meet thee three men going up to God to Beth–el, one carrying three kids, and another carrying three loaves of bread, and another carrying a bottle of wine:

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque te salutaverint, dabunt tibi duos panes, et accipies de manu eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁאֲל֥וּ לְךָ֖ לְשָׁל֑וֹם וְנָתְנ֤וּ לְךָ֙ שְׁתֵּי־לֶ֔חֶם וְלָקַחְתָּ֖ מִיָּדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they will salute thee, and will give thee two loaves, and thou shalt take them at their hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne tervehtivät sinua ystävällisesti, antavat sinulle kaksi leipää: ota ne heidän kädestänsä.
verses.king_james: And they will salute thee, and give thee two loaves of bread; which thou shalt receive of their hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Post hæc venies in collem Dei, ubi est statio Philisthinorum : et cum ingressus fueris ibi urbem, obvium habebis gregem prophetarum descendentium de excelso, et ante eos psalterium, et tympanum, et tibiam, et citharam, ipsosque prophetantes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֣חַר כֵּ֗ן תָּבוֹא֙ גִּבְעַ֣ת הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים אֲשֶׁר־שָׁ֖ם נְצִבֵ֣י פְלִשְׁתִּ֑ים וִיהִי֩ כְבֹאֲךָ֨ שָׁ֜ם הָעִ֗יר וּפָגַעְתָּ֞ חֶ֤בֶל נְבִאִים֙ יֹרְדִ֣ים מֵהַבָּמָ֔ה וְלִפְנֵיהֶ֞ם נֵ֤בֶל וְתֹף֙ וְחָלִ֣יל וְכִנּ֔וֹר וְהֵ֖מָּה מִֽתְנַבְּאִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: After that thou shalt come to the hill of God, where the garrison of the Philistines is: and when thou shalt be come there into the city, thou shalt meet a company of prophets coming down from the high place, with a psaltery, and a timbrel, and a pipe, and a harp before them, and they shall be prophesying.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte tulet sinä Jumalan korkeudelle, kussa Philistealaisten leirit ovat. Ja pitää tapahtuman, että tultuas kaupunkiin, kohtaat prophetain joukon, jotka ovat tulleet korkeudelta, ja heidän edellänsä kantele ja trumpu, huilut ja harput, ja he propheteeraavat.
verses.king_james: After that thou shalt come to the hill of God, where is the garrison of the Philistines: and it shall come to pass, when thou art come thither to the city, that thou shalt meet a company of prophets coming down from the high place with a psaltery, and a tabret, and a pipe, and a harp, before them; and they shall prophesy:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et insiliet in te spiritus Domini, et prophetabis cum eis, et mutaberis in virum alium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצָלְחָ֤ה עָלֶ֙יךָ֙ ר֣וּחַ יְהֹוָ֔ה וְהִתְנַבִּ֖יתָ עִמָּ֑ם וְנֶהְפַּכְתָּ֖ לְאִ֥ישׁ אַחֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Spirit of the Lord shall come upon thee, and thou shalt prophesy with them, and shalt be changed into another man.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran henki tulee sinussa voimalliseksi, ettäs propheteeraat heidän kanssansa ja tulet toiseksi mieheksi.
verses.king_james: And the Spirit of the Lord will come upon thee, and thou shalt prophesy with them, and shalt be turned into another man.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quando ergo evenerint signa hæc omnia tibi, fac quæcumque invenerit manus tua, quia Dominus tecum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה כִּ֥י (תבאינה) [תָבֹ֛אנָה] הָאֹת֥וֹת הָאֵ֖לֶּה לָ֑ךְ עֲשֵׂ֤ה לְךָ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר תִּמְצָ֣א יָדֶ֔ךָ כִּ֥י הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: When therefore these signs shall happen to thee, do whatsoever thy hand shall find, for the Lord is with thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin nämät merkit tapahtuvat sinulle, niin tee kaikki, mitä etees tulee; sillä Jumala on sinun kanssas.
verses.king_james: And let it be, when these signs are come unto thee, that thou do as occasion serve thee; for God is with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et descendes ante me in Galgala (ego quippe descendam ad te), ut offeras oblationem, et immoles victimas pacificas : septem diebus expectabis, donec veniam ad te, et ostendam tibi quid facias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָרַדְתָּ֣ לְפָנַי֮ הַגִּלְגָּל֒ וְהִנֵּ֤ה אָנֹכִי֙ יֹרֵ֣ד אֵלֶ֔יךָ לְהַעֲל֣וֹת עֹל֔וֹת לִזְבֹּ֖חַ זִבְחֵ֣י שְׁלָמִ֑ים שִׁבְעַ֨ת יָמִ֤ים תּוֹחֵל֙ עַד־בּוֹאִ֣י אֵלֶ֔יךָ וְהוֹדַעְתִּ֣י לְךָ֔ אֵ֖ת אֲשֶׁ֥ר תַּעֲשֶֽׂה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt go down before me to Galgal, (for I will come down to thee), that thou mayst offer an oblation, and sacrifice victims of peace: seven days shalt thou wait, till I come to thee, and I will shew thee what thou art to do.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinun pitää menemän minun edelläni alas Gilgaliin, ja katso, minä tulen sinne sinun tykös uhraamaan polttouhria ja kiitosuhria: seitsemän päivää pitää sinun odottaman, siihenasti kuin minä tulen sinun tykös ja ilmoitan sinulle, mitä sinun pitää tekemän.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt go down before me to Gilgal; and, behold, I will come down unto thee, to offer burnt offerings, and to sacrifice sacrifices of peace offerings: seven days shalt thou tarry, till I come to thee, and shew thee what thou shalt do.

verses.latin_vulgate: Itaque cum avertisset humerum suum ut abiret a Samuele, immutavit ei Deus cor aliud, et venerunt omnia signa hæc in die illa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה כְּהַפְנֹת֤וֹ שִׁכְמוֹ֙ לָלֶ֙כֶת֙ מֵעִ֣ם שְׁמוּאֵ֔ל וַיַּהֲפׇךְ־ל֥וֹ אֱלֹהִ֖ים לֵ֣ב אַחֵ֑ר וַיָּבֹ֛אוּ כׇּל־הָאֹת֥וֹת הָאֵ֖לֶּה בַּיּ֥וֹם הַהֽוּא׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: So when he had turned his back to go from Samuel, God gave unto him another heart, and all these things came to pass that day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui, että kuin hän oli kääntänyt selkänsä Samuelin puoleen ja meni hänen tyköänsä pois, antoi Jumala hänelle toisen sydämen; ja kaikki nämät merkit tapahtuivat sinä päivänä.
verses.king_james: And it was so, that when he had turned his back to go from Samuel, God gave him another heart: and all those signs came to pass that day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Veneruntque ad prædictum collem, et ecce cuneus prophetarum obvius ei : et insiluit super eum spiritus Domini, et prophetavit in medio eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֤אוּ שָׁם֙ הַגִּבְעָ֔תָה וְהִנֵּ֥ה חֶבֶל־נְבִאִ֖ים לִקְרָאת֑וֹ וַתִּצְלַ֤ח עָלָיו֙ ר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים וַיִּתְנַבֵּ֖א בְּתוֹכָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they came to the foresaid hill, and behold a company of prophets met him: and the Spirit of the Lord came upon him, and he prophesied in the midst of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin he tulivat sinne korkeudelle, katso, prophetain joukko kohtasi häntä, ja Jumalan henki tuli voimalliseksi hänessä, että hän propheteerasi heidän keskellänsä.
verses.king_james: And when they came thither to the hill, behold, a company of prophets met him; and the Spirit of God came upon him, and he prophesied among them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videntes autem omnes qui noverant eum heri et nudiustertius quod esset cum prophetis, et prophetaret, dixerunt ad invicem : Quænam res accidit filio Cis ? num et Saul inter prophetas ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י כׇּל־יֽוֹדְעוֹ֙ מֵאִתְּמ֣וֹל שִׁלְשֹׁ֔ם וַיִּרְא֕וּ וְהִנֵּ֥ה עִם־נְבִאִ֖ים נִבָּ֑א {ס} וַיֹּ֨אמֶר הָעָ֜ם אִ֣ישׁ אֶל־רֵעֵ֗הוּ מַה־זֶּה֙ הָיָ֣ה לְבֶן־קִ֔ישׁ הֲגַ֥ם שָׁא֖וּל בַּנְּבִיאִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all that had known him yesterday and the day before, seeing that he was with the prophets, and prophesied, said to each other: What is this that hath happened to the son of Cis? is Saul also among the prophets?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin hänen kaikki näkivät jotka ennen hänen tunteneet olivat, ja katso, hän propheteerasi prophetain kanssa, sanoivat he toinen toisellensa: mitä Kisin pojalle tapahtunut on? onko Saul myös prophetain seassa?
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when all that knew him beforetime saw that, behold, he prophesied among the prophets, then the people said one to another, What is this that is come unto the son of Kish? Is Saul also among the prophets?

verses.latin_vulgate: Responditque alius ad alterum, dicens : Et quis pater eorum ? Propterea versum est in proverbium : Num et Saul inter prophetas ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַן אִ֥ישׁ מִשָּׁ֛ם וַיֹּ֖אמֶר וּמִ֣י אֲבִיהֶ֑ם עַל־כֵּן֙ הָיְתָ֣ה לְמָשָׁ֔ל הֲגַ֥ם שָׁא֖וּל בַּנְּבִאִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And one answered another, saying: And who is their father? therefore it became a proverb: Is Saul also among the prophets?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja yksi vastasi siellä ja sanoi: kuka on heidän isänsä? Siitä on sananlasku tullut onko Saul myös prophetain seassa?
verses.king_james: And one of the same place answered and said, But who is their father? Therefore it became a proverb, Is Saul also among the prophets?

verses.latin_vulgate: Cessavit autem prophetare, et venit ad excelsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְכַל֙ מֵֽהִתְנַבּ֔וֹת וַיָּבֹ֖א הַבָּמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he had made an end of prophesying, he came to the high place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin hän lakkasi propheteeraamasta, tuli hän korkeudelle.
verses.king_james: And when he had made an end of prophesying, he came to the high place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque patruus Saul ad eum, et ad puerum ejus : Quo abistis ? Qui responderunt : Quærere asinas : quas cum non reperissemus, venimus ad Samuelem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֩אמֶר֩ דּ֨וֹד שָׁא֥וּל אֵלָ֛יו וְאֶֽל־נַעֲר֖וֹ אָ֣ן הֲלַכְתֶּ֑ם וַיֹּ֗אמֶר לְבַקֵּשׁ֙ אֶת־הָ֣אֲתֹנ֔וֹת וַנִּרְאֶ֣ה כִי־אַ֔יִן וַנָּב֖וֹא אֶל־שְׁמוּאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Saul's uncle said to him, and to his servant: Whither went you? They answered: To seek the asses: and not finding them, we went to Samuel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Saulin setä sanoi hänelle ja hänen palveliallensa: kussa te kävitte? Ja hän sanoi: me etsimme aasintammoja, ja kuin me näimme, ettemme löytäneet, tulimme me Samuelin tykö.
verses.king_james: And Saul’s uncle said unto him and to his servant, Whither went ye? And he said, To seek the asses: and when we saw that they were no where, we came to Samuel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit ei patruus suus : Indica mihi quid dixerit tibi Samuel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֖אמֶר דּ֣וֹד שָׁא֑וּל הַגִּֽידָה־נָּ֣א לִ֔י מָה־אָמַ֥ר לָכֶ֖ם שְׁמוּאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his uncle said to him: Tell me what Samuel said to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Saulin setä: sano siis minulle, mitä Samuel sanoi teille?
verses.king_james: And Saul’s uncle said, Tell me, I pray thee, what Samuel said unto you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Saul ad patruum suum : Indicavit nobis quia inventæ essent asinæ. De sermone autem regni non indicavit ei quem locutus fuerat ei Samuel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר שָׁאוּל֙ אֶל־דּוֹד֔וֹ הַגֵּ֤ד הִגִּיד֙ לָ֔נוּ כִּ֥י נִמְצְא֖וּ הָאֲתֹנ֑וֹת וְאֶת־דְּבַ֤ר הַמְּלוּכָה֙ לֹא־הִגִּ֣יד ל֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֖ר אָמַ֥ר שְׁמוּאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Saul said to his uncle: He told us that the asses were found. But of the matter of the kingdom of which Samuel had spoken to him, he told him not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Saul vastasi sedällensä: hän sanoi yksivakaisesti aasintammat jo löydetyksi; mutta kuninkaan valtakunnasta ei hän mitään hänelle puhunut, mitä Samuel hänelle sanonut oli.
verses.king_james: And Saul said unto his uncle, He told us plainly that the asses were found. But of the matter of the kingdom, whereof Samuel spake, he told him not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et convocavit Samuel populum ad Dominum in Maspha :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּצְעֵ֤ק שְׁמוּאֵל֙ אֶת־הָעָ֔ם אֶל־יְהֹוָ֖ה הַמִּצְפָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel called together the people to the Lord in Maspha:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Samuel antoi kutsua kansan kokoon Herran tykö Mitspaan.
verses.king_james: And Samuel called the people together unto the Lord to Mizpeh;

verses.latin_vulgate: et ait ad filios Israël : Hæc dicit Dominus Deus Israël : Ego eduxi Israël de Ægypto, et erui vos de manu Ægyptiorum, et de manu omnium regum qui affligebant vos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר ׀ אֶל־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל {פ}כֹּֽה־אָמַ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אָנֹכִ֛י הֶעֱלֵ֥יתִי אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל מִמִּצְרָ֑יִם וָאַצִּ֤יל אֶתְכֶם֙ מִיַּ֣ד מִצְרַ֔יִם וּמִיַּד֙ כׇּל־הַמַּמְלָכ֔וֹת הַלֹּחֲצִ֖ים אֶתְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to the children of Israel: Thus saith the Lord the God of Israel: I brought up Israel out of Egypt, and delivered you from the hand of the Egyptians, and from the hand of all the kings who afflicted you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi Israelin lapsille: näin sanoo Herra Israelin Jumala: minä johdatin Israelin Egyptistä, ja vapahdin teidät Egyptiläisten käsistä ja kaikkein valtakuntain käsistä, jotka teitä vaivasivat.
verses.king_james: And said unto the children of Israel, Thus saith the Lord God of Israel, I brought up Israel out of Egypt, and delivered you out of the hand of the Egyptians, and out of the hand of all kingdoms, and of them that oppressed you:

verses.latin_vulgate: Vos autem hodie projecistis Deum vestrum, qui solus salvavit vos de universis malis et tribulationibus vestris : et dixistis : Nequaquam : sed regem constitue super nos. Nunc ergo state coram Domino per tribus vestras, et per familias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתֶּ֨ם הַיּ֜וֹם מְאַסְתֶּ֣ם אֶת־אֱלֹהֵיכֶ֗ם אֲשֶׁר־ה֨וּא מוֹשִׁ֣יעַ לָכֶם֮ מִכׇּל־רָעוֹתֵיכֶ֣ם וְצָרֹתֵיכֶם֒ וַתֹּ֣אמְרוּ ל֔וֹ כִּי־מֶ֖לֶךְ תָּשִׂ֣ים עָלֵ֑ינוּ וְעַתָּ֗ה הִֽתְיַצְּבוּ֙ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה לְשִׁבְטֵיכֶ֖ם וּלְאַלְפֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But you this day have rejected your God, who only hath saved you out of all your evils and your tribulations: and you have said: Nay: but set a king over us. Now therefore stand before the Lord by your tribes, and by your families.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja te hylkäsitte tänäpänä teidän Jumalanne, joka teidät kaikesta vastoinkäymisestänne ja murheestanne auttanut on, ja sanoitte: pane meille kuningas. Nyt siis käykäät Herran eteen sukuinne ja päämiestenne jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And ye have this day rejected your God, who himself saved you out of all your adversities and your tribulations; and ye have said unto him, Nay, but set a king over us. Now therefore present yourselves before the Lord by your tribes, and by your thousands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et applicuit Samuel omnes tribus Israël, et cecidit sors tribus Benjamin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּקְרֵ֣ב שְׁמוּאֵ֔ל אֵ֖ת כׇּל־שִׁבְטֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיִּלָּכֵ֖ד שֵׁ֥בֶט בִּנְיָמִֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel brought to him all the tribes of Israel, and the lot fell on the tribe of Benjamin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Samuel oli koonnut kaikki Israelin sukukunnat, lankesi arpa BenJaminin sukuun.
verses.king_james: And when Samuel had caused all the tribes of Israel to come near, the tribe of Benjamin was taken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et applicuit tribum Benjamin et cognationes ejus, et cecidit cognatio Metri : et pervenit usque ad Saul filium Cis. Quæsierunt ergo eum, et non est inventus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּקְרֵ֞ב אֶת־שֵׁ֤בֶט בִּנְיָמִן֙ לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֔ו וַתִּלָּכֵ֖ד מִשְׁפַּ֣חַת הַמַּטְרִ֑י וַיִּלָּכֵד֙ שָׁא֣וּל בֶּן־קִ֔ישׁ וַיְבַקְשֻׁ֖הוּ וְלֹ֥א נִמְצָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought the tribe of Benjamin and the kindreds thereof, and the lot fell upon the kindred of Metri, and it came to Saul, the son of Cis. They sought him therefore, and he was not found.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kuin hän BenJaminin suvun kutsui lankoinensa edes, lankesi arpa Matrin suvun päälle, ja lankesi Kisin pojan Saulin päälle. Ja he etsivät häntä, mutta ei häntä löydetty.
verses.king_james: When he had caused the tribe of Benjamin to come near by their families, the family of Matri was taken, and Saul the son of Kish was taken: and when they sought him, he could not be found.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et consuluerunt post hæc Dominum utrumnam venturus esset illuc. Responditque Dominus : Ecce absconditus est domi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁאֲלוּ־עוֹד֙ בַּֽיהֹוָ֔ה הֲבָ֥א ע֖וֹד הֲלֹ֣ם אִ֑ישׁ {ס} וַיֹּ֣אמֶר יְהֹוָ֔ה הִנֵּה־ה֥וּא נֶחְבָּ֖א אֶל־הַכֵּלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after this they consulted the Lord whether he would come thither. And the Lord answered: Behold he is hidden at home.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he kysyivät Herralta, oliko hän vielä sinne tuleva. Herra vastasi: katso, hän on lymyttänyt itsensä astiain alle.
verses.king_james: Therefore they enquired of the Lord further, if the man should yet come thither. And the Lord answered, Behold, he hath hid himself among the stuff.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cucurrerunt itaque et tulerunt eum inde : stetitque in medio populi, et altior fuit universo populo ab humero et sursum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּרֻ֙צוּ֙ וַיִּקָּחֻ֣הוּ מִשָּׁ֔ם וַיִּתְיַצֵּ֖ב בְּת֣וֹךְ הָעָ֑ם וַיִּגְבַּהּ֙ מִכׇּל־הָעָ֔ם מִשִּׁכְמ֖וֹ וָמָֽעְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they ran and fetched him thence: and he stood in the midst of the people, and he was higher than any of the people from the shoulders and upward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he juoksivat ja toivat hänen sieltä. Ja hän seisoi kansan keskellä, ja hän oli päätänsä pitempi kaikkea kansaa.
verses.king_james: And they ran and fetched him thence: and when he stood among the people, he was higher than any of the people from his shoulders and upward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Samuel ad omnem populum : Certe videtis quem elegit Dominus, quoniam non sit similis illi in omni populo. Et clamavit omnis populus, et ait : Vivat rex.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵ֜ל אֶל־כׇּל־הָעָ֗ם הַרְּאִיתֶם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּחַר־בּ֣וֹ יְהֹוָ֔ה כִּ֛י אֵ֥ין כָּמֹ֖הוּ בְּכׇל־הָעָ֑ם וַיָּרִ֧עוּ כׇל־הָעָ֛ם וַיֹּאמְר֖וּ יְחִ֥י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said to all the people: Surely you see him whom the Lord hath chosen, that there is none like him among all the people. And all the people cried and said: God save the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Samuel sanoi kaikelle kansalle: näettekö, kenenkä Herra on valinnut? sillä ei hänen vertaistansa ole yhtään kaikessa kansassa. Niin huusi kaikki kansa ja sanoi: olkoon kuninkaalle onneksi!
verses.king_james: And Samuel said to all the people, See ye him whom the Lord hath chosen, that there is none like him among all the people? And all the people shouted, and said, God save the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutus est autem Samuel ad populum legem regni, et scripsit in libro, et reposuit coram Domino : et dimisit Samuel omnem populum, singulos in domum suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֨ר שְׁמוּאֵ֜ל אֶל־הָעָ֗ם אֵ֚ת מִשְׁפַּ֣ט הַמְּלֻכָ֔ה וַיִּכְתֹּ֣ב בַּסֵּ֔פֶר וַיַּנַּ֖ח לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיְשַׁלַּ֧ח שְׁמוּאֵ֛ל אֶת־כׇּל־הָעָ֖ם אִ֥ישׁ לְבֵיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel told the people the law of the kingdom, and wrote it in a book, and laid it up before the Lord: and Samuel sent away all the people, every one to his own house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Samuel sanoi kansalle kaikki valtakunnan oikeuden, ja kirjoitti kirjaan, ja pani sen Herran eteen. Ja Samuel päästi kaiken kansan, itsekunkin kotiansa.
verses.king_james: Then Samuel told the people the manner of the kingdom, and wrote it in a book, and laid it up before the Lord. And Samuel sent all the people away, every man to his house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et Saul abiit in domum suam in Gabaa : et abiit cum eo pars exercitus, quorum tetigerat Deus corda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֨ם־שָׁא֔וּל הָלַ֥ךְ לְבֵית֖וֹ גִּבְעָ֑תָה וַיֵּלְכ֣וּ עִמּ֔וֹ הַחַ֕יִל אֲשֶׁר־נָגַ֥ע אֱלֹהִ֖ים בְּלִבָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Saul also departed to his own house in Gabaa: and there went with him a part of the army, whose hearts God had touched.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Saul meni myös kotia Gibeaan, ja yksi osa sotaväestä meni hänen kanssansa, joiden sydämen Jumala käänsi.
verses.king_james: And Saul also went home to Gibeah; and there went with him a band of men, whose hearts God had touched.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii vero Belial dixerunt : Num salvare nos poterit iste ? Et despexerunt eum, et non attulerunt ei munera : ille vero dissimulabat se audire.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֧י בְלִיַּ֣עַל אָמְר֗וּ מַה־יֹּשִׁעֵ֙נוּ֙ זֶ֔ה וַיִּבְזֻ֕הוּ וְלֹא־הֵבִ֥יאוּ ל֖וֹ מִנְחָ֑ה וַיְהִ֖י כְּמַחֲרִֽישׁ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But the children of Belial said: Shall this fellow be able to save us? And they despised him, and brought him no presents; but he dissembled as though he heard not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta monikahdat Belialin lapset sanoivat: mitä tämä auttaa meitä? ja katsoivat hänen ylön ja ei tuoneet hänelle mitään lahjaa. Mutta hän teeskenteli, niinkuin ei hän sitä kuullutkaan olisi.
verses.king_james: But the children of Belial said, How shall this man save us? And they despised him, and brought him no presents. But he held his peace.
